task_completion.description: Navigate to the CRISPR Gene Editing tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'CRISPR Gene Editing' tiddler is visible in the main content area with its existing tags.

task_completion.description: Open the tiddler editor by clicking the pencil/edit icon
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler is in edit mode with the title field, tag area, and text editor visible.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Biotechnology' tag to the tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tag pill labeled 'Biotechnology' appears in the tag area of the tiddler editor or viewer.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Nobel' tag to the tiddler
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tag pill labeled 'Nobel' appears in the tag area of the tiddler editor or viewer.

task_completion.description: Keep existing Science, Biology, and Genetics tags
task_completion.visual_evidence: All original tag pills (Science, Biology, Genetics) are still visible alongside the new tags.

task_completion.description: Save the tiddler with updated tags
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tiddler is saved and displayed in view mode with all 5 tags visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the TiddlyWiki browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the TiddlyWiki web interface in Firefox.

integrity.description: Verify the tiddler content was not modified
integrity.visual_evidence: The CRISPR Gene Editing tiddler content remains intact with sections about How It Works, Applications, and Ethical Considerations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target tiddler is 'CRISPR Gene Editing' with existing tags Science, Biology, Genetics. Two new tags must be added: 'Biotechnology' and 'Nobel'. All 5 tags should be visible after completion.
